name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Store card popup: the second balance now shows "Yesterday's closing" instead of today's (which was just the current balance again). Pick a past month or date and it shows that period's closing instead.
Every stat-card popup's summary (money in / out / net) already follows the date scope you've selected — this just makes the store balances line up with it too.
